primary_text:
I cancelled my pet insurance after the second premium increase. $87 to $160 a month in two years. I had barely claimed.

Then a friend told me about Best for Pet. $50/month. Unlimited vet consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

No claims forms. No excess. No pre-existing conditions. No waiting period.

Not insurance. A wellness plan for the care your pet needs every year.

No joining fee. Cancel anytime. 270+ clinics.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: I cancelled pet insurance. Found this.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, all vaccinations, $250 off dental. No claims.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: UGC-style quote card. Insurance vs Best for Pet side-by-side. Warm, relatable.
